mapper.select: select user_id as userId, user_code as userCode, memory_enabled as memoryEnabled, answer_style as answerStyle, favorite_modules as favoriteModules, query_habits as queryHabits, (select count(1) from ai_user_memory m where m.deleted = 0 and m.user_id = p.user_id and ifnull(m.user_code, '') = ifnull(p.user_code, '')) as memoryCount, date_format(last_recall_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as lastRecallTime from ai_user_profile p where user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '') and deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into ai_user_profile (id, user_id, user_code, memory_enabled, answer_style, created_at, updated_at, deleted) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{userCode}, 1, #{answerStyle}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp, 0)
mapper.update: update ai_user_profile set memory_enabled = #{memoryEnabled}, answer_style = #{answerStyle}, updated_at = current_timestamp where user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '') and deleted = 0

update ai_user_profile set favorite_modules = #{favoriteModules}, query_habits = #{queryHabits}, updated_at = current_timestamp where user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '') and deleted = 0
mapper.select:
select id, memory_type as memoryType, memory_title as memoryTitle, memory_summary as memorySummary, confidence, qdrant_point_id as qdrantPointId, date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createTime, date_format(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as updateTime, date_format(last_recall_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as lastRecallTime from ai_user_memory
order by updated_at desc limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}

select id, memory_type as memoryType, memory_title as memoryTitle, memory_summary as memorySummary, confidence, qdrant_point_id as qdrantPointId, date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createTime, date_format(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as updateTime, date_format(last_recall_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as lastRecallTime from ai_user_memory where deleted = 0 and user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '') and (#{keyword} is null or #{keyword} = '' or memory_title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or memory_summary like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) order by last_recall_time desc, confidence desc, updated_at desc limit #{limit}

select id, memory_type as memoryType, memory_title as memoryTitle, memory_summary as memorySummary, confidence, qdrant_point_id as qdrantPointId, date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createTime, date_format(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as updateTime, date_format(last_recall_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as lastRecallTime from ai_user_memory where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '') and deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into ai_user_memory ( id, user_id, user_code, memory_type, memory_title, memory_summary, confidence, qdrant_point_id, source_conversation_id, source_trace_id, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) values ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{userCode}, #{memoryType}, #{memoryTitle}, #{memorySummary}, #{confidence}, #{qdrantPointId}, #{sourceConversationId}, #{sourceTraceId}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp, 0 )
mapper.update: update ai_user_memory set last_recall_time = current_timestamp, recall_count = ifnull(recall_count, 0) + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
update ai_user_memory set deleted = 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '')
mapper.insert: insert into ai_memory_event ( id, memory_id, event_type, event_source, user_id, user_code, trace_id, operation_id, login_session_id, ai_conversation_id, event_summary, created_at ) values ( #{id}, #{memoryId}, #{eventType}, #{eventSource}, #{userId}, #{userCode}, #{traceId}, #{operationId}, #{loginSessionId}, #{aiConversationId}, #{eventSummary}, current_timestamp )
